content: Build shared frontend: useLiveRound hook + LiveBar component
Rewrite AviatorGame.js - Spribe-style universal live (curve, plane, dual panels, auto-cashout, feed, history)
Upgrade RouletteGame.js - 30s loop + richer wheel with white ball + felt board polish
Convert 11 game components to live rounds (dice, target, wheel, checker, duel, no-hold, champion, andar-bahar, keno, bingo, slots)
Run testing agent (backend + frontend) and fix all reported bugs
